values.description: Daily backup job compliance report for obs-lab
values.name: obs_lab_backup_compliance_report

values.alarm_description: AWS Backup job failed. Check AWS Backup console for details.
AWS Backup cross-region copy failed. DR region may have stale data.

values.description: CMK for AWS Backup vault encryption — obs-lab-backup
CMK for AWS Backup DR vault — obs-lab-backup-dr

values.alarm_description: RDS managed secret rotation has failed. Check CloudTrail for RotationFailed events.

values.description: Subnet group for obs-lab-postgres in data subnets

values.description: CMK for RDS encryption at-rest — obs-lab-postgres
ARN of RDS-managed Secrets Manager secret (auto-rotated)
values.name: /obs/lab/database/secret-arn

values.description: KMS key for VPC Flow Logs encryption - obs
ALB - Allow HTTP/HTTPS from Internet, forward to App tier
Application containers - Receive from ALB, connect to Data/EFS
Bastion host - SSH from trusted CIDRs, access internal resources
Data tier (RDS/Redis/Kafka) - Accept ONLY from App and Bastion SGs
EFS mount targets - NFS from App tier only
HTTPS to Internet (APIs, package managers, AWS services)
HTTPS to Internet (yum/apt updates, AWS CLI, SSM agent)
SSH to internal hosts for debugging
Ephemeral port responses to App tier
Ephemeral port responses to Bastion (admin queries)

backup_selection_tag.description: Tag key/value to add to resources for backup protection

backup_sns_topic_arn.description: SNS topic ARN for backup notifications (reusable by other modules)

s3_endpoint_prefix_list_id.description: S3 prefix list ID (for SG rules restricting egress to S3)

backup_role_arn.description: ARN of the IAM role used by AWS Backup

kms_key_arn.description: ARN of the KMS CMK for primary vault encryption

kms_key_dr_arn.description: ARN of the KMS CMK for DR vault encryption (null if disabled)

report_bucket_name.description: S3 bucket name for backup compliance reports (null if disabled)

report_plan_arn.description: ARN of the backup compliance report plan (null if disabled)

selection_tag.description: Tag key/value pair used for backup selection (add this tag to resources to protect them)

sns_topic_arn.description: ARN of the SNS topic for backup notifications (reusable for other modules)

vault_arn.description: ARN of the primary backup vault

vault_dr_arn.description: ARN of the DR region backup vault (null if cross-region copy disabled)

vault_name.description: Name of the primary backup vault

alarm_description.constant_value: AWS Backup job failed. Check AWS Backup console for details.
AWS Backup cross-region copy failed. DR region may have stale data.

backup_reports_retention_days.description: Days to retain backup reports in S3 before auto-expiry

common_tags.description: Common tags applied to all resources

cross_region_copy_retention_days.description: Days to retain cross-region backup copies

daily_cold_storage_after_days.description: Move daily backups to cold storage after N days (0 = disabled). If enabled, daily_retention_days must be >= cold_storage_after + 90 (AWS minimum cold storage period)

daily_completion_window.description: Minutes after backup job starts that it must complete (120-10080). For large databases (100GB+), increase to 720+ minutes

daily_schedule.description: Cron expression for daily backup schedule (UTC)

daily_start_window.description: Minutes after scheduled time that a backup job must start before being canceled (60-480)

enable_backup_reports.description: Enable daily backup compliance reports to S3 (recommended for SOC2/HIPAA)

enable_cloudwatch_alarms.description: Create CloudWatch alarms for backup job failures

enable_cross_region_copy.description: Enable cross-region backup copy to DR region

enable_monthly_plan.description: Enable monthly long-term retention backup plan

monthly_cold_storage_after_days.description: Move monthly backups to cold storage after N days (0 = disabled). If enabled, monthly_retention_days must be >= cold_storage_after + 90 (AWS minimum cold storage period)

monthly_completion_window.description: Minutes after monthly backup starts that it must complete (120-10080). Monthly backups can be large; 480 (8h) is default

monthly_schedule.description: Cron expression for monthly backup schedule (UTC)

monthly_start_window.description: Minutes after scheduled time that a monthly backup must start (60-480)

notification_email.description: Email address for backup failure notifications (empty = no email subscription)

project_name.description: Project name used for resource naming

selection_tag_key.description: Tag key used to auto-discover resources for backup

selection_tag_value.description: Tag value that triggers backup protection

vault_lock_changeable_days.description: Number of days before vault lock becomes immutable (only for compliance mode, 3-36500)

vault_lock_max_retention_days.description: Maximum retention enforced by vault lock (days)

vault_lock_min_retention_days.description: Minimum retention enforced by vault lock (days)

vault_lock_mode.description: Vault lock mode: governance (admin can override) or compliance (immutable, even root cannot delete)

cloudwatch_log_group_name.description: CloudWatch Log Group name for RDS PostgreSQL logs

db_secret_arn.description: ARN of the RDS-managed Secrets Manager secret (auto-rotated every 7 days)

db_secret_status.description: Status of the RDS-managed secret (Active = healthy)

kms_key_arn.description: ARN of the KMS CMK used for RDS encryption

replica_addresses.description: List of read replica hostnames (without port)

replica_instance_ids.description: List of read replica instance identifiers

ssm_parameter_arns.description: Map of SSM parameter ARNs for IAM policy construction

ssm_parameter_prefix.description: SSM parameter path prefix for wildcard IAM policies

alarm_description.constant_value: RDS managed secret rotation has failed. Check CloudTrail for RotationFailed events.

description.constant_value: ARN of RDS-managed Secrets Manager secret (auto-rotated)

alarm_connections_threshold.description: Database connections threshold for alarm (varies by instance class: t3.micro≈87, t3.small≈174, t3.medium≈348)

alarm_free_storage_threshold.description: Free storage space threshold for alarm (bytes)

alarm_sns_topic_arn.description: SNS topic ARN for alarm notifications (empty = no notifications)

apply_immediately.description: Apply changes immediately (true for lab) or during maintenance window (false for prod)

auto_minor_version_upgrade.description: Auto-apply minor engine upgrades during maintenance window (security patches)

backup_retention_period.description: Number of days to retain automated backups (0 = disabled)

common_tags.description: Common tags applied to all resources

data_security_group_id.description: Security Group ID for data layer (allows app → DB traffic)

data_subnet_ids.description: List of data subnet IDs for RDS placement (minimum 2 AZs)

db_name.description: Name of the default database to create

deletion_protection.description: Prevent accidental deletion of the RDS instance

enable_cloudwatch_alarms.description: Create CloudWatch alarms for CPU, storage, and connection monitoring

engine_version.description: PostgreSQL engine version (check region availability: aws rds describe-db-engine-versions --engine postgres --query 'DBEngineVersions[].EngineVersion')

enhanced_monitoring_interval.description: Enhanced Monitoring interval in seconds (0 = disabled, 1/5/10/15/30/60)

max_allocated_storage.description: Maximum storage for autoscaling in GB (0 = disabled)

multi_az.description: Enable Multi-AZ deployment for high availability

project_name.description: Project name used for resource naming

replica_instance_class.description: Instance class for read replicas (can differ from primary for analytics)

secret_rotation_days.description: Alert when DB password has not been rotated in this many days (SOC2/HIPAA: 90 days)

skip_final_snapshot.description: Skip final snapshot on destroy (true for lab/dev, false for prod)

vpc_id.description: VPC ID for RDS subnet group

az_map.description: Map of AZ short key to full AZ name

data_route_table_id.description: ID of the data route table

data_subnet_cidrs.description: List of data subnet CIDR blocks

mgmt_route_table_ids.description: Map of AZ key → management route table ID

mgmt_subnet_cidrs.description: List of management subnet CIDR blocks

nat_public_ips.description: List of NAT Gateway public IPs

private_route_table_ids.description: Map of AZ key → private route table ID

private_subnet_cidrs.description: List of private subnet CIDR blocks

private_subnets.description: Map of AZ key → private subnet attributes

public_route_table_id.description: ID of the public route table

public_subnet_cidrs.description: List of public subnet CIDR blocks

public_subnets.description: Map of AZ key → public subnet attributes

aws_region.description: AWS region for endpoint service names

az_count.description: Number of Availability Zones to use (2 or 3)

common_tags.description: Common tags applied to all resources

enable_flow_logs.description: Enable VPC Flow Logs to CloudWatch

flow_logs_retention_days.description: CloudWatch Log Group retention in days for flow logs

project_name.description: Project name used for resource naming

single_nat_gateway.description: Use a single NAT Gateway (cost-saving) vs one per AZ (HA)

application_security_group_id.description: Security Group ID for application containers

bastion_instance_profile_arn.description: ARN of Bastion IAM Instance Profile (empty string if disabled)

bastion_instance_profile_name.description: Name of Bastion IAM Instance Profile (empty string if disabled)

bastion_role_arn.description: ARN of Bastion IAM Role (empty string if disabled)

bastion_security_group_id.description: Security Group ID for bastion host (empty string if disabled)

data_security_group_id.description: Security Group ID for data layer (RDS, Redis, MSK)

ecs_task_execution_role_arn.description: ARN of ECS Task Execution Role

ecs_task_execution_role_name.description: Name of ECS Task Execution Role

ecs_task_role_arn.description: ARN of ECS Task Role (app-level permissions)

efs_security_group_id.description: Security Group ID for EFS mount targets

key_pair_name.description: Name of the SSH key pair (empty string if disabled)

observability_security_group_id.description: Security Group ID for observability stack

security_group_ids.description: Map of all security group IDs for bulk operations

description.constant_value: ALB - Allow HTTP/HTTPS from Internet, forward to App tier
Application containers - Receive from ALB, connect to Data/EFS
Bastion host - SSH from trusted CIDRs, access internal resources
Data tier (RDS/Redis/Kafka) - Accept ONLY from App and Bastion SGs
EFS mount targets - NFS from App tier only
HTTPS to Internet (APIs, package managers, AWS services)
HTTPS to Internet (yum/apt updates, AWS CLI, SSM agent)
SSH to internal hosts for debugging
Ephemeral port responses to App tier
Ephemeral port responses to Bastion (admin queries)

allowed_ssh_cidrs.description: List of CIDRs allowed to SSH into bastion host

app_health_check_port.description: Health check port if different from app_port (0 = same as app_port)

app_port.description: Application container port (used in App SG ingress from ALB)

common_tags.description: Common tags applied to all resources

db_ports.description: Map of database service names to their ports

enable_bastion.description: Enable bastion host resources (SG, IAM, key pair)

generate_ssh_key.description: Auto-generate SSH key pair (true for lab, false for production)

kms_key_arn.description: ARN of the KMS key used to encrypt secrets. If empty, uses wildcard with kms:ViaService condition.

monitoring_ports.description: Map of monitoring service names to their ports

project_name.description: Project name used for resource naming

public_key_path.description: Path to SSH public key file (used when generate_ssh_key = false)

vpc_cidr_block.description: VPC CIDR block for internal traffic rules

vpc_id.description: VPC ID to create security groups in

all_endpoint_ids.description: Flat list of ALL endpoint IDs (gateway + interface) for audit

dynamodb_endpoint_id.description: ID of the DynamoDB Gateway Endpoint (empty string if disabled)

dynamodb_endpoint_prefix_list_id.description: Prefix list ID for DynamoDB Gateway Endpoint

endpoints_security_group_id.description: Security Group ID for VPC Interface Endpoints (empty string if disabled)

gateway_endpoints.description: Map of gateway endpoint names to IDs

interface_endpoint_dns.description: Map of service name → primary DNS entry

interface_endpoint_ids.description: Map of service name → Interface Endpoint ID

s3_endpoint_id.description: ID of the S3 Gateway Endpoint (empty string if disabled)

s3_endpoint_prefix_list_id.description: Prefix list ID for S3 Gateway Endpoint (use in SG rules to restrict S3 egress)

description.constant_value: Allow HTTPS from VPC to Interface VPC Endpoints
HTTPS from VPC to Interface Endpoints

common_tags.description: Common tags applied to all resources

enable_dynamodb_endpoint.description: Enable DynamoDB Gateway Endpoint (FREE — enable if using DynamoDB)

enable_interface_endpoints.description: Enable Interface VPC Endpoints (~$7.2/month per endpoint per AZ)

enable_s3_endpoint.description: Enable S3 Gateway Endpoint (FREE — should always be true)

interface_endpoint_services.description: List of AWS services to create Interface Endpoints for

private_subnet_ids.description: List of private subnet IDs for Interface Endpoint placement

project_name.description: Project name used for resource naming

route_table_ids.description: List of all route table IDs to associate with Gateway Endpoints

s3_endpoint_policy.description: Custom IAM policy JSON for S3 Gateway Endpoint. If empty, uses default (full S3 access from VPC).

vpc_cidr.description: CIDR block of the VPC (used for Security Group ingress rules)

vpc_id.description: ID of the VPC to create endpoints in

allowed_ssh_cidrs.description: CIDR blocks allowed to SSH to bastion host

backup_cross_region_retention_days.description: Days to retain cross-region backup copies

backup_enable_cloudwatch_alarms.description: Create CloudWatch alarms for backup job failures

backup_enable_cross_region_copy.description: Enable cross-region backup copy to DR region

backup_notification_email.description: Email for backup failure notifications (empty = no email)

backup_vault_lock_mode.description: Vault lock mode: governance or compliance

db_apply_immediately.description: Apply RDS changes immediately or during maintenance window

db_deletion_protection.description: Prevent accidental deletion of RDS instance

db_enable_cloudwatch_alarms.description: Create CloudWatch alarms for database monitoring

db_enhanced_monitoring_interval.description: Enhanced Monitoring interval in seconds (0 = disabled)

db_max_allocated_storage.description: Maximum storage for autoscaling in GB

db_skip_final_snapshot.description: Skip final snapshot on destroy (true for lab)

dr_region.description: AWS region for disaster recovery (cross-region backup copy)

enable_bastion.description: Enable bastion host resources (SG, IAM, Key Pair)

enable_interface_endpoints.description: Enable Interface VPC Endpoints (~$7.2/month per endpoint per AZ)

environment.description: Environment name for tagging and resource identification

generate_ssh_key.description: Auto-generate SSH key pair (true for lab, false for production)

project_name.description: Project name used for resource naming

single_nat_gateway.description: true = 1 NAT (save cost), false = 1 NAT per AZ (HA)
